title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
